title: Hieracium svaneticiforme
taxonomy: Hieracium svaneticiforme is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe, specifically belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Hieracium, which consists of approximately 1000 species. This genus is further classified into several sections and subsections. The classification of Hieracium svaneticiforme is based on its morphological characteristics, such as leaf shape and flower color. Further research may be needed to determine its exact classification within the genus.

intro: Hieracium svaneticiforme, also known as Svaneti hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Bioactive constituents of Hieracium svaneticiforme include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
